notes: Redirects to Atlassian account login (id.atlassian.com). Clean single-field email entry, then password step. Google and Microsoft SSO options. Atlassian shared auth across Jira/Confluence/Trello. Simple DOM.

endpoints.label: Login Form
endpoints.description: Email address input with Continue button, then password step (multi-step Atlassian login flow)

endpoints.label: SSO Options
endpoints.description: Google and Microsoft OAuth sign-in buttons for single sign-on

endpoints.label: Account Links
endpoints.description: Can't Log In (account recovery) and Create Account links
